first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the core reasoning in the justification, strengths, and concerns sections is substantively unchanged. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as a senior web developer who lacks the specific, required skills for an embedded networking role (native Japanese, C programming, kernel modification). The minor variations in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run noise and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the location change from Berlin to Bucharest.
